# Copy these to your GitHub repository "About" section

## Description (paste in GitHub About):
🎓 Interactive programming learning platform with AI chatbot, live code execution, automated certificates, and progress tracking. Next.js • NestJS • PostgreSQL • OpenAI

## Website (after deployment):
https://your-app.railway.app

## Topics (add as tags):
learning-platform education e-learning programming nextjs nestjs typescript react postgresql prisma ai-chatbot openai gpt-4 rag code-execution certificates docker kubernetes fullstack online-learning interactive-learning code-challenges auto-grading oauth jwt-authentication vector-database weaviate monaco-editor educational-technology

## How to add:
1. Go to: https://github.com/Belmkademabdellatif/Learning
2. Click the ⚙️ (gear) icon next to "About"
3. Paste description
4. Add website URL (after deployment)
5. Add topics (space-separated)
6. Check "✅ Include in the home page"
7. Click "Save changes"
